libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25, ensure the generated test setup applies nativeTest/runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as well: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on loopback; no Docker service or external endpoint is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The public OAuth2WebClient API depends on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless that optional dependency is intentionally added.
External HTTP services would make tests flaky; use local loopback servers for request, redirect, cookie, form, multipart, and streaming coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x Core 5.0.1 and Netty 4.2.2.Final; the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already needs Netty/JDK 25 native-run system properties, but its condition is pinned to 5.0.0.
